query:
SELECT 
  oi.id as order_item_id,
  oi.variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName,
  COUNT(vm.id) as material_count
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN variant_materials vm ON pv.id = vm.variantId
WHERE oi.orderId = 240001
GROUP BY oi.id, oi.variantId, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName
ORDER BY oi.id;
